title: Welcome new member
body:
Welcome to the Study Association T.F.V. 'Professor Francken'!

We recommend going to your profile and updating your information. Also, read our Code of Conduct to get familiar with the association and our customs.

title: Bi-weekly update
body: Here is a summary of the latest updates from the association.

title: Francken Vrij
body: Read the latest issue of Francken Vrij! The theme for this issue is 'Salt'. Read about the latest developments in the association.

title: Ticket release
body: Tickets for the Elemental Gala go on sale next week.
